ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-08-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing An Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Feb-08-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing An Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Dec-07-2021 Continued To Feb-08-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lauren Peebles, via ZOOM, for Idea Mae Jones, via CourtCall, Administrator.

The court reminds Ms. Peebles that the court expects the Inventory and Appraisal filed four months after appointment of Administrator and that delays cannot continue. The court then points Ms. Peebles to the amounts in both this and related petitions and questions whether those estimates are diligent. Ms. Peebles reports that both petitions are about one real property wherein her client is the only heir. The court reminds M. Peebles that her petition for approval on status of administration that she had previously filed had been taken off calendar due to lack of litigation. Ms. Peebles reports that she expects to file a Petition for Final Distribution and that she has mailed an Inventory and Appraisal to the probate referee. The court confirms that the referee assigned to the matter has retired and Michael Kasolas is appointed the new probate referee. Ms. Peebles is instructed to email a proposed order regarding the preceding to the courtroom clerk.

After additional discussion, the Status on Filing of Inventory and Appraisal and Status on Close of Estate are continued to Feb-08-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The Order to Appear is off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-07-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-07-2021 Continued To Feb-08-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-02-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Personal Representative Ida Mae Jones and Attorney Lauren Peebles to appear on Dec-07-2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear.

The court sets the following statuses for the same date:

1) Status on Filing an Inventory and Appraisal.
2) Status on Close of Estate.

The Petition set for today is taken off calendar, merited by the failure to appear.

The court appoints Michael Kasolas as the new probate referee, in open court.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-22-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-17-2021 Continued To Sep-22-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lauren Peebles appeared by zoom for Ida Mae Jones (Administrator).

Ms. Peebles stated that her office has not been able to file a petition for final distribution, but they filed a petition to extend time to close the estate and for approval of a status report yesterday. Ms. Peebles also stated that the inventory and appraisal will be sent to the Probate Referee. Status on close of estate is continued to September 22, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-01-2021 Continued To Aug-17-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lauren Peebles, via ZOOM, counsel for Ida Jones, Administrator.

At the outset, the court queries counsel as to the status of this case as there has been no filing of a Petition for Final Distribution or Status of Administration or Inventory and Appraisal. Counsel reports that there have been delays due to the pandemic and that there are two other estate matters in which the administrator in this matter is awaiting to be appointed.

After additional discussion, the Status on Closing of Estate is continued to August 17, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204. Counsel is ordered to file a Petition for Final Distribution or Petition on Status of Administration and a Inventory and Appraisal by August 03, 2021.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
